mapper.select: select wt.work_date,wt.work_time,d.doctor_no,d.doctor_name,dept.dept_name,wt.reserve_max,wt.reserved from work_table wt inner join doctor d on wt.doctor_no = d.doctor_no inner join dept on d.dept_id = dept.dept_id where d.doctor_no=#{doctorNo}
mapper.update: update doctor set doctor_pic = #{doctorPic} where doctor_no = #{doctorNo}
